testcase.name: test_evite_sus_one_day_create

failure.message: AssertionError: Fail verify name, expecting evite-volunteer-20260222-2255-531060-test, got

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_sus_one_day_create.TestEviteSUSOneDayCreate object at 0x7f96f179f110> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f96f1117e30>
def test_evite_sus_one_day_create(self, config): _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] sign_up_sheet_maker = config.pages["sign_up_sheet_maker"]
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) logger.info("Start %s", _test_name)
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(inspect.stack()[0][3]) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time() if host: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = host else: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}" )
sign_up_sheet_maker.select_sus_event_from_meganav(sus_event="one_day")
sign_up_sheet_maker.enter_details(test_data=self._json_test_data) sign_up_sheet_maker.create_sheet_one_day(test_data=self._json_test_data) sign_up_sheet_maker.verify_sheet_sign_ups(test_data=self._json_test_data)
sign_up_sheet_maker.publish_sheet() shareable_link = sign_up_sheet_maker.copy_shareable_link()
login_modal.sign_out()
# Get Volunteer view to build SUS data config.driver.get(shareable_link) logger.info("Going volunteer url - %s", config.driver.current_url)
sign_up_sheet = sign_up_sheet_maker.get_sign_up_sheet_one_day()
volunteers = sign_up_sheet_maker.initialize_volunteers(volunteers=self._json_test_data["volunteers"])
for volunteer in volunteers:
if volunteer["registered"]: logger.info("Registering guest: %s", volunteer["name"])
# Change register data self._json_test_data["register"]["first_name"] = volunteer["name"] self._json_test_data["register"]["email"] = volunteer["email_addr"]
# Register login_modal.register(test_data=self._json_test_data["register"], existing_user=True)
sus_row = sign_up_sheet_maker.get_random_sus_row(sus=sign_up_sheet)
sign_up_sheet_maker.select_sign_up(sus_row) > sign_up_sheet_maker.volunteer_sign_up(volunteer=volunteer)
_test_name = 'test_evite_sus_one_day_create' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f96f1117e30> evite_home_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_home_page.EviteHomePage object at 0x7f96f1117500> host = 'automation test' logger = <Logger test_evite_sus_one_day_create (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7f96f1117b30> my_events = <commons.pages.evite.my_events.MyEvents object at 0x7f96f1117260> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7f96f1116750> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_sus_one_day_create.TestEviteSUSOneDayCreate object at 0x7f96f179f110> shareable_link = 'https://evite.me/tmg4s6AnZm' sign_up_sheet = [{'row_count': 2, 'row_filled': 0, 'row_title': 'drinks'}, {'row_count': 5, 'row_filled': 0, 'row_title': 'chips'}, {'row_count': 10, 'row_filled': 0, 'row_title': 'food'}] sign_up_sheet_maker = <commons.pages.evite.sign_up_sheet_maker.SignUpSheetMaker object at 0x7f96f1117e00> sus_row = {'row_count': 10, 'row_filled': 0, 'row_title': 'food'} user_email_addr = 'evite-02222026-225431-04-test@evitetest.com' user_pass = 'test1234' volunteer = {'comment': 'THIS IS A VOLUNTEER COMMENT', 'email_addr': 'evite-volunteer-20260222-2255-531060-test@evitetest.com', 'guest_count': 2, 'kids_count': 0, ...} volunteers = [{'comment': 'THIS IS A VOLUNTEER COMMENT', 'email_addr': 'evite-volunteer-20260222-2255-531060-test@evitetest.com', '...ENT', 'email_addr': 'evite-volunteer-20260222-2255-531414-test@evitetest.com', 'guest_count': 0, 'kids_count': 0, ...}]

def volunteer_sign_up(self, volunteer): self.logger.info("Start %s.%s", self.__class__.__name__, inspect.stack()[0][3])
if volunteer["comment"]: self.find_text_box_clear_enter_text(self._sign_up_comment, volunteer["comment"])
if volunteer["registered"]: # If registered, then Name and Email must be prepopulated already, verify and continue if self.is_element_visible(self._sign_up_name): web_name = self.find(self._sign_up_name).get_attribute("value") > assert volunteer["name"] in web_name, f"Fail verify name, expecting {volunteer['name']}, got {web_name}" E AssertionError: Fail verify name, expecting evite-volunteer-20260222-2255-531060-test, got
